v.CNV: 过了安息日，在礼拜日天亮的时候，抹大拉的马利亚和另一个马利亚来看坟墓。
v.ESV: Now after the Sabbath, toward the dawn of the first day of the week, Mary Magdalene and the other Mary went to see the tomb.
v.GAE: 안식일이 다 지나고 안식 후 첫날이 되려는 새벽에 막달라 마리아와 다른 마리아가 무덤을 보려고 갔더니
v.KJV: In the end of the sabbath, as it began to dawn toward the first day of the week, came Mary Magdalene and the other Mary to see the sepulchre.
v.NASB: Now after the Sabbath, as it began to dawn toward the first day of the week, Mary Magdalene and the other Mary came to look at the grave.
v.NIV: After the Sabbath, at dawn on the first day of the week, Mary Magdalene and the other Mary went to look at the tomb.
v.NRSV: After the sabbath, as the first day of the week was dawning, Mary Magdalene and the other Mary went to see the tomb.
v.SAENEW: 안식일이 지나고, 이레의 첫 날 동틀 무렵에, 막달라 마리아와 다른 마리아가 무덤을 보러 갔다.
v.WLB: 안식일 다음날, 바로 그 주의 첫날 동틀 무렵에 막달라 마리아와 다른 마리아가 무덤을 보러 갔습니다.

v.CNV: 忽然，地震得很厉害；主的使者从天上下来，把石头辊开，坐在上面。
v.ESV: And behold, there was a great earthquake, for an angel of the Lord descended from heaven and came and rolled back the stone and sat on it.
v.GAE: 큰 지진이 나며 주의 천사가 하늘로부터 내려와 돌을 굴려 내고 그 위에 앉았는데
v.KJV: And, behold, there was a great earthquake: for the angel of the Lord descended from heaven, and came and rolled back the stone from the door, and sat upon it.
v.NASB: And behold, a severe earthquake had occurred, for an angel of the Lord descended from heaven and came and rolled away the stone and sat upon it.
v.NIV: There was a violent earthquake, for an angel of the Lord came down from heaven and, going to the tomb, rolled back the stone and sat on it.
v.NRSV: And suddenly there was a great earthquake; for an angel of the Lord, descending from heaven, came and rolled back the stone and sat on it.
v.SAENEW: 그런데 갑자기 큰 지진이 일어났다. 주님의 한 천사가 하늘에서 내려와 무덤에 다가와서, 그 돌을 굴려 내고, 그 돌 위에 앉았다.
v.WLB: 그런데 갑자기 큰 지진이 일어나더니 주의 천사가 하늘에서 내려와 돌을 굴려 내고 그 돌 위에 앉았습니다.

v.CNV: 他的样子好像闪电，衣服洁白如雪。
v.ESV: His appearance was like lightning, and his clothing white as snow.
v.GAE: 그 형상이 번개 같고 그 옷은 눈 같이 희거늘
v.KJV: His countenance was like lightning, and his raiment white as snow:
v.NASB: And his appearance was like lightning, and his clothing as white as snow.
v.NIV: His appearance was like lightning, and his clothes were white as snow.
v.NRSV: His appearance was like lightning, and his clothing white as snow.
v.SAENEW: 그 천사의 모습은 번개와 같았고, 그의 옷은 눈과 같이 희었다.
v.WLB: 그 천사의 모습은 번개와 같았고 옷은 눈처럼 희었습니다.

v.CNV: 看守的人因为害怕他，就浑身战抖，好像死了一样。
v.ESV: And for fear of him the guards trembled and became like dead men.
v.GAE: 지키던 자들이 그를 무서워하여 떨며 죽은 사람과 같이 되었더라
v.KJV: And for fear of him the keepers did shake, and became as dead men.
v.NASB: The guards shook for fear of him and became like dead men.
v.NIV: The guards were so afraid of him that they shook and became like dead men.
v.NRSV: For fear of him the guards shook and became like dead men.
v.SAENEW: 지키던 사람들은 천사를 보고 두려워서 떨었고, 죽은 사람처럼 되었다.
v.WLB: 경비병들은 그 천사를 보고 두려워 떨면서 마치 죽은 사람들처럼 됐습니다.

v.CNV: 那使者对妇女们说：“你们不要怕，我知道你们在找被钉十字架的耶稣。
v.ESV: But the angel said to the women, “Do not be afraid, for I know that you seek Jesus who was crucified.
v.GAE: 천사가 여자들에게 말하여 이르되 너희는 무서워하지 말라 십자가에 못 박히신 예수를 너희가 찾는 줄을 내가 아노라
v.KJV: And the angel answered and said unto the women, Fear not ye: for I know that ye seek Jesus, which was crucified.
v.NASB: The angel said to the women, 'Do not be afraid; for I know that you are looking for Jesus who has been crucified.
v.NIV: The angel said to the women, “Do not be afraid, for I know that you are looking for Jesus, who was crucified.
v.NRSV: But the angel said to the women, “Do not be afraid; I know that you are looking for Jesus who was crucified.
v.SAENEW: 천사가 여자들에게 말하였다. "두려워하지 말아라. 나는, 너희가 십자가에 달리신 예수를 찾는 줄 안다.
v.WLB: 그 천사가 여자들에게 말했습니다. “두려워하지 말라. 너희가 십자가에 못 박히신 예수를 찾고 있는 것을 안다.

v.CNV: 他不在这里，已经照他所说的复活了。你们来看安放他的地方吧。
v.ESV: He is not here, for he has risen, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay.
v.GAE: 그가 여기 계시지 않고 그가 말씀 하시던 대로 살아나셨느니라 와서 그가 누우셨던 곳을 보라
v.KJV: He is not here: for he is risen, as he said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay.
v.NASB: 'He is not here, for He has risen, just as He said. Come, see the place where He was lying.
v.NIV: He is not here; he has risen, just as he said. Come and see the place where he lay.
v.NRSV: He is not here; for he has been raised, as he said. Come, see the place where he lay.
v.SAENEW: 그는 여기에 계시지 않다. 그가 말씀하신 대로, 그는 살아나셨다. 와서 그가 누워 계시던 곳을 보아라.
v.WLB: 예수께서는 여기 계시지 않고 말씀하신 대로 살아나셨다. 여기 와서 예수께서 누워 계셨던 자리를 보라.

v.CNV: 快去告诉他的门徒：‘他已经从死人中复活了。他会比你们先到加利利去，你们在那里必看见他。’现在我已经告诉你们了。”
v.ESV: Then go quickly and tell his disciples that he has risen from the dead, and behold, he is going before you to Galilee; there you will see him. See, I have told you.”
v.GAE: 또 빨리 가서 그의 제자들에게 이르되 그가 죽은 자 가운데서 살아나셨고 너희보다 먼저 갈릴리로 가시나니 거기서 너희가 뵈오리라 하라 보라 내가 너희에게 일렀느니라 하거늘
v.KJV: And go quickly, and tell his disciples that he is risen from the dead; and, behold, he goeth before you into Galilee; there shall ye see him: lo, I have told you.
v.NASB: 'Go quickly and tell His disciples that He has risen from the dead; and behold, He is going ahead of you into Galilee, there you will see Him; behold, I have told you.'
v.NIV: Then go quickly and tell his disciples: ‘He has risen from the dead and is going ahead of you into Galilee. There you will see him.’ Now I have told you.”
v.NRSV: Then go quickly and tell his disciples, ‘He has been raised from the dead, and indeed he is going ahead of you to Galilee; there you will see him.’ This is my message for you.”
v.SAENEW: 그리고 빨리 가서 제자들에게 전하기를, 그는 죽은 사람들 가운데서 살아 나셔서, 그들보다 먼저 갈릴리로 가시니, 그들은 거기서 그를 뵙게 될 것이라고 하여라. 이것이 내가 너희에게 하는 말이다."
v.WLB: 그리고 빨리 가서 그분의 제자들에게 ‘예수께서 죽은 사람 가운데서 살아나셨고, 너희보다 먼저 갈릴리로 가시니 그곳에서 너희가 예수를 보게 될 것이다’라고 말하라. 자, 이것이 내가 너희에게 전하는 말이다.”

v.CNV: 她们立刻离开坟墓，又害怕，又十分欢喜，跑去告诉耶稣的门徒。
v.ESV: So they departed quickly from the tomb with fear and great joy, and ran to tell his disciples.
v.GAE: 그 여자들이 무서움과 큰 기쁨으로 빨리 무덤을 떠나 제자들에게 알리려고 달음질할새
v.KJV: And they departed quickly from the sepulchre with fear and great joy; and did run to bring his disciples word.
v.NASB: And they left the tomb quickly with fear and great joy and ran to report it to His disciples.
v.NIV: So the women hurried away from the tomb, afraid yet filled with joy, and ran to tell his disciples.
v.NRSV: So they left the tomb quickly with fear and great joy, and ran to tell his disciples.
v.SAENEW: 여자들은 무서움과 큰 기쁨이 엇갈려서, 급히 무덤을 떠나, 이 소식을 그의 제자들에게 전하려고 달려갔다.
v.WLB: 그러자 여인들은 서둘러 무덤을 떠났습니다. 그들은 두려우면서도 한편으로는 기쁨에 가득 차 제자들에게 알리려고 뛰어갔습니다.

v.CNV: 忽然，耶稣向她们迎面而来，说：“你们好。”她们就上前，抱住他的脚拜他。
v.ESV: And behold, Jesus met them and said, “Greetings!” And they came up and took hold of his feet and worshiped him.
v.GAE: 예수께서 그들을 만나 이르시되 평안하냐 하시거늘 여자들이 나아가 그 발을 붙잡고 경배하니
v.KJV: And as they went to tell his disciples, behold, Jesus met them, saying, All hail. And they came and held him by the feet, and worshipped him.
v.NASB: And behold, Jesus met them and greeted them. And they came up and took hold of His feet and worshiped Him.
v.NIV: Suddenly Jesus met them. “Greetings,” he said. They came to him, clasped his feet and worshiped him.
v.NRSV: Suddenly Jesus met them and said, “Greetings!” And they came to him, took hold of his feet, and worshiped him.
v.SAENEW: 그런데 갑자기 예수께서 여자들과 마주쳐서 "평안하냐?" 하고 말씀하셨다. 여자들은 다가가서, 그의 발을 붙잡고, 그에게 절을 하였다.
v.WLB: 그때 갑자기 예수께서 여인들에게 나타나 말씀하셨습니다. “평안하냐?” 그들은 예수께 다가가 예수의 발을 붙잡고 예수께 절했습니다.

v.CNV: 耶稣对她们说：“不要怕，去告诉我的弟兄，叫他们到加利利去，他们在那里必看见我。”
v.ESV: Then Jesus said to them, “Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee, and there they will see me.”
v.GAE: 이에 예수께서 이르시되 무서워하지 말라 가서 내 형제들에게 갈릴리로 가라 하라 거기서 나를 보리라 하시니라
v.KJV: Then said Jesus unto them, Be not afraid: go tell my brethren that they go into Galilee, and there shall they see me.
v.NASB: Then Jesus said to them, 'Do not be afraid; go and take word to My brethren to leave for Galilee, and there they will see Me.'
v.NIV: Then Jesus said to them, “Do not be afraid. Go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me.”
v.NRSV: Then Jesus said to them, “Do not be afraid; go and tell my brothers to go to Galilee; there they will see me.”
v.SAENEW: 그 때에 예수께서 그 여자들에게 말씀하셨다. "무서워하지 말아라. 가서, 나의 형제들에게 갈릴리로 가라고 전하여라. 그러면, 거기에서 그들이 나를 만날 것이다."
v.WLB: 그러자 예수께서 그들에게 말씀하셨습니다. “두려워하지 말라. 가서 내 형제들에게 갈릴리로 가라고 전하라. 그곳에서 그들이 나를 만날 것이다.”

v.CNV: 她们去的时候，有些卫兵进了城，把一切所发生的事向祭司长报告。
v.ESV: While they were going, behold, some of the guard went into the city and told the chief priests all that had taken place.
v.GAE: 여자들이 갈 때 경비병 중 몇이 성에 들어가 모든 된 일을 대제사장들에게 알리니
v.KJV: Now when they were going, behold, some of the watch came into the city, and shewed unto the chief priests all the things that were done.
v.NASB: Now while they were on their way, some of the guard came into the city and reported to the chief priests all that had happened.
v.NIV: While the women were on their way, some of the guards went into the city and reported to the chief priests everything that had happened.
v.NRSV: While they were going, some of the guard went into the city and told the chief priests everything that had happened.
v.SAENEW: 여자들이 가는데, 경비병 가운데 몇 사람이 성 안으로 들어가서, 일어난 일을 모두 대제사장들에게 보고하였다.
v.WLB: 그 여인들이 길을 가는 동안 몇몇 경비병들은 성안으로 들어가서 대제사장들에게 일어난 일들을 모두 보고했습니다.

v.CNV: 祭司长就和长老聚集在一起商量，然后拿许多钱给士兵，
v.ESV: And when they had assembled with the elders and taken counsel, they gave a sufficient sum of money to the soldiers
v.GAE: 그들이 장로들과 함께 모여 의논하고 군인들에게 돈을 많이 주며
v.KJV: And when they were assembled with the elders, and had taken counsel, they gave large money unto the soldiers,
v.NASB: And when they had assembled with the elders and consulted together, they gave a large sum of money to the soldiers,
v.NIV: When the chief priests had met with the elders and devised a plan, they gave the soldiers a large sum of money,
v.NRSV: After the priests had assembled with the elders, they devised a plan to give a large sum of money to the soldiers,
v.SAENEW: 대제사장들은 장로들과 함께 모여 의논한 끝에, 병사들에게 은돈을 많이 집어 주고
v.WLB: 그러자 대제사장들은 장로들과 만나 계략을 꾸미고는 군인들에게 많은 돈을 쥐어 주며 말했습니다.

v.CNV: 说：“你们要这样说：‘他的门徒晚上来了，趁我们睡着的时候，把他偷走了。’
v.ESV: and said, “Tell people, ‘His disciples came by night and stole him away while we were asleep.’
v.GAE: 이르되 너희는 말하기를 그의 제자들이 밤에 와서 우리가 잘 때에 그를 도둑질하여 갔다 하라
v.KJV: Saying, Say ye, His disciples came by night, and stole him away while we slept.
v.NASB: and said, 'You are to say, 'His disciples came by night and stole Him away while we were asleep.'
v.NIV: telling them, “You are to say, ‘His disciples came during the night and stole him away while we were asleep.’
v.NRSV: telling them, “You must say, ‘His disciples came by night and stole him away while we were asleep.’
v.SAENEW: 말하였다. "'예수의 제자들이 밤중에 와서, 우리가 잠든 사이에 시체를 훔쳐갔다' 하고 말하여라.
v.WLB: “‘예수의 제자들이 밤중에 와서 우리가 잠든 사이에 시체를 훔쳐 갔다’고 말하라.

v.CNV: 如果总督知道了这件事，我们会说服他，不会牵连你们。”
v.ESV: And if this comes to the governor's ears, we will satisfy him and keep you out of trouble.”
v.GAE: 만일 이 말이 총독에게 들리면 우리가 권하여 너희로 근심하지 않게 하리라 하니
v.KJV: And if this come to the governor’s ears, we will persuade him, and secure you.
v.NASB: 'And if this should come to the governor's ears, we will win him over and keep you out of trouble.'
v.NIV: If this report gets to the governor, we will satisfy him and keep you out of trouble.”
v.NRSV: If this comes to the governor’s ears, we will satisfy him and keep you out of trouble.”
v.SAENEW: 이 소문이 총독의 귀에 들어가게 되더라도, 우리가 잘 말해서, 너희에게 아무 해가 미치지 않게 해주겠다."
v.WLB: 만약 이 소문이 총독의 귀에 들어가더라도 우리가 잘 말해서 너희에게 문제가 없도록 해 주겠다.”

v.CNV: 士兵收了钱，就照着祭司长和长老的指使去作。这种说法直到今日还流传在犹太人当中。
v.ESV: So they took the money and did as they were directed. And this story has been spread among the Jews to this day.
v.GAE: 군인들이 돈을 받고 가르친 대로 하였으니 이 말이 오늘날까지 유대인 가운데 두루 퍼지니라
v.KJV: So they took the money, and did as they were taught: and this saying is commonly reported among the Jews until this day.
v.NASB: And they took the money and did as they had been instructed; and this story was widely spread among the Jews, and is to this day.
v.NIV: So the soldiers took the money and did as they were instructed. And this story has been widely circulated among the Jews to this very day.
v.NRSV: So they took the money and did as they were directed. And this story is still told among the Jews to this day.
v.SAENEW: 그들은 돈을 받고서, 시키는 대로 하였다. 그리고 이 말이 오늘날까지 유대인들 사이에 널리 퍼져 있다.
v.WLB: 그러자 군인들은 돈을 받고 시키는 대로 했습니다. 그래서 이 말이 오늘날까지도 유대 사람들 사이에 널리 퍼지게 된 것입니다.

v.CNV: 十一个门徒往加利利去，到了耶稣指定的山上。
v.ESV: Now the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain to which Jesus had directed them.
v.GAE: 열한 제자가 갈릴리에 가서 예수께서 지시하신 산에 이르러
v.KJV: Then the eleven disciples went away into Galilee, into a mountain where Jesus had appointed them.
v.NASB: But the eleven disciples proceeded to Galilee, to the mountain which Jesus had designated.
v.NIV: Then the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain where Jesus had told them to go.
v.NRSV: Now the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain to which Jesus had directed them.
v.SAENEW: 열한 제자가 갈릴리로 가서, 예수께서 일러주신 산에 이르렀다.
v.WLB: 열한 제자들이 갈릴리로 가서 예수께서 일러 주신 산에 이르렀습니다.

v.CNV: 他们看见耶稣就拜他，但仍然有些人怀疑。
v.ESV: And when they saw him they worshiped him, but some doubted.
v.GAE: 예수를 뵈옵고 경배하나 아직도 의심하는 사람들이 있더라
v.KJV: And when they saw him, they worshipped him: but some doubted.
v.NASB: When they saw Him, they worshiped Him; but some were doubtful.
v.NIV: When they saw him, they worshiped him; but some doubted.
v.NRSV: When they saw him, they worshiped him; but some doubted.
v.SAENEW: 그들은 예수를 뵙고, 절을 하였다. 그러나 의심하는 사람들도 있었다.
v.WLB: 그리고 그들은 예수를 뵙고 경배드렸습니다. 그러나 어떤 사람들은 의심했습니다.

v.CNV: 耶稣上前来，对他们说：“天上地上一切权柄都赐给我了。
v.ESV: And Jesus came and said to them, “All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.
v.GAE: 예수께서 나아와 말씀하여 이르시되 하늘과 땅의 모든 권세를 내게 주셨으니
v.KJV: And Jesus came and spake unto them, saying, All power is given unto me in heaven and in earth.
v.NASB: And Jesus came up and spoke to them, saying, 'All authority has been given to Me in heaven and on earth.
v.NIV: Then Jesus came to them and said, “All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.
v.NRSV: And Jesus came and said to them, “All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.
v.SAENEW: 예수께서 다가와서, 그들에게 말씀하셨다. "나는 하늘과 땅의 모든 권세를 받았다.
v.WLB: 그때 예수께서 다가오셔서 그들에게 말씀하셨습니다. “하늘과 땅의 모든 권세가 내게 주어졌다.

v.CNV: 所以，你们要去使万民作我的门徒，奉父子圣灵的名，给他们施洗（“奉父子圣灵的名，给他们施洗”或译：“给他们施洗，归入父子圣灵的名”），
v.ESV: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,
v.GAE: 그러므로 너희는 가서 모든 민족을 제자로 삼아 아버지와 아들과 성령의 이름으로 세례를 베풀고
v.KJV: Go ye therefore, and teach all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost:
v.NASB: 'Go therefore and make disciples of all the nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit,
v.NIV: Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,
v.NRSV: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,
v.SAENEW: 그러므로 너희는 가서, 모든 민족을 제자로 삼아서, 아버지와 아들과 성령의 이름으로 세례를 주고,
v.WLB: 그러므로 너희는 가서 모든 민족을 제자로 삼아 아버지와 아들과 성령의 이름으로 세례를 주고

v.CNV: 我吩咐你们的一切，都要教导他们遵守。这样，我就常常与你们同在，直到这世代的终结。”
v.ESV: teaching them to observe all that I have commanded you. And behold, I am with you always, to the end of the age.”
v.GAE: 내가 너희에게 분부한 모든 것을 가르쳐 지키게 하라 볼지어다 내가 세상 끝날까지 너희와 항상 함께 있으리라 하시니라
v.KJV: Teaching them to observe all things whatsoever I have commanded you: and, lo, I am with you alway, even unto the end of the world. Amen.
v.NASB: teaching them to observe all that I commanded you; and lo, I am with you always, even to the end of the age.'
v.NIV: and teaching them to obey everything I have commanded you. And surely I am with you always, to the very end of the age.”
v.NRSV: and teaching them to obey everything that I have commanded you. And remember, I am with you always, to the end of the age.”
v.SAENEW: 내가 너희에게 명령한 모든 것을 그들에게 가르쳐 지키게 하여라. 보아라, 내가 세상 끝 날까지 항상 너희와 함께 있을 것이다."
v.WLB: 내가 너희에게 명령한 모든 것을 그들에게 가르쳐 지키게 하라. 보라. 내가 세상 끝 날까지 너희와 항상 함께 있을 것이다.”
